/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.combinatorics.named_groups import DihedralGroup
from sympy.combinatorics.free_groups import free_group
D3=DihedralGroup(3)
P=D3.presentation()
print('D gens:', D3.generators)
print('P gens:', P.generators)
print('rels:', P.relators)
for r in P.relators:
    print('\\nr=',r,'array=',r.array_form,'len',len(r))
    print('elts:', [r[i] for i in range(len(r))])
    for i in range(len(r)):
        print(i, r[i], 'in Pgens?', r[i] in P.generators, 'inv in?', r[i]**-1 in P.generators)
    for sym,pow in r.array_form:
        print('arraypart', sym, type(sym), pow, 'eq gens?', [sym==g for g in P.generators])
PY"

from sympy.combinatorics.named_groups import DihedralGroup
for n in (3, 4, 5, 8):
    D = DihedralGroup(n)
    P = D.presentation()
    print('D', n)
    print('domain generators:', D.generators)
    print('presentation generators:', P.generators)
    for rel in P.relators:
        print(' rel:', rel, 'array:', rel.array_form, 'letters:', list(rel))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.combinatorics.homomorphisms import homomorphism
from sympy.combinatorics.named_groups import AlternatingGroup, CyclicGroup, DihedralGroup, SymmetricGroup
cases = [
    ('C3', CyclicGroup(3)),
    ('D3', DihedralGroup(3)),
    ('D4', DihedralGroup(4)),
    ('D5', DihedralGroup(5)),
    ('A4', AlternatingGroup(4)),
    ('S3', SymmetricGroup(3)),
    ('S4', SymmetricGroup(4)),
]
for name, G in cases:
    try:
        T = homomorphism(G, G, G.generators, G.generators)
    except Exception as exc:
        print(name, 'FAIL', type(exc).__name__, exc)
    else:
        print(name, 'PASS', T.is_isomorphism())
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.combinatorics.homomorphisms import homomorphism
from sympy.combinatorics.named_groups import AlternatingGroup, CyclicGroup, DihedralGroup, SymmetricGroup
cases = [
    ('C3', CyclicGroup(3)),
    ('D3', DihedralGroup(3)),
    ('D4', DihedralGroup(4)),
    ('D5', DihedralGroup(5)),
    ('A4', AlternatingGroup(4)),
    ('S3', SymmetricGroup(3)),
    ('S4', SymmetricGroup(4)),
]
for name, G in cases:
    try:
        T = homomorphism(G, G, G.generators, G.generators)
    except Exception as exc:
        print(name, 'FAIL', type(exc).__name__, exc)
    else:
        print(name, 'PASS', T.is_isomorphism())
PY"

from sympy.combinatorics.named_groups import AlternatingGroup, SymmetricGroup
for name,G in [('A4', AlternatingGroup(4)), ('A5', AlternatingGroup(5)), ('S3', SymmetricGroup(3)), ('S4', SymmetricGroup(4))]:
    P=G.presentation()
    print(name, G.generators)
    for rel in P.relators:
        print(' ', rel)
PY"
